session.user: Load and follow the skill instructions in .claude/skills/pr-feedback-classifier/SKILL.md Arguments: --pr 8642 Return the complete JSON output as your final message.
session.assistant: I'll load the skill and execute it with the specified arguments.
session.tool_result:
1→--- 2→name: pr-feedback-classifier 3→description: > 4→ Fetches and classifies PR review feedback with context isolation. 5→ Returns structured JSON with thread IDs for deterministic resolution. 6→ Use when analyzing PR comments before addressing them. 7→argument-hint: "[--pr <number>] [--include-resolved]" 8→context: fork 9→agent: general-purpose 10→model: sonnet 11→--- 12→ 13→# PR Feedback Classifier 14→ 15→Fetch and classify all PR review feedback for the current branch's PR. 16→ 17→## Arguments 18→ 19→- `--pr <number>`: Target a specific PR by number (default: current branch's PR) 20→- `--include-resolved`: Include resolved threads (for reference) 21→ 22→Check `$ARGUMENTS` for flags. 23→ 24→## Critical Constraints 25→ 26→**DO NOT write Python scripts or any code files.** Classify the data using direct AI reasoning only. Writing code to process JSON is unnecessary and pollutes the filesystem. 27→ 28→## Steps 29→ 30→1. **Fetch PR info and all comments in a single call:**
... [194 lines omitted] ...
130→ "action_summary": "Bot suggestion: add unit tests for error handling paths", 132→ "original_comment": "Consider adding unit tests for the error handling paths in this endpoint" 170→ "error": null 184→## Error Case 198→ "error": "No PR found for branch feature-xyz" 216→ "error": null
session.assistant: Now I'll fetch the PR feedback using the specified PR number:

## ❌ Audit PR Docs

**Last updated:** 2026-03-03 16:28:38 PT

Found 7 violations across 4 files (4 duplicates from prior run, 3 new). Inline comments posted for 3 new violations.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Patterns Checked
✅ Index/tripwire-only files — No violations (cli/index.md, cli/tripwires.md, erk/index.md, erk/tripwires.md, integrations/tripwires.md, testing/index.md, testing/tripwires.md, tripwires-index.md, configuration/schema-driven-config.md, integrations/bundled-artifacts.md, integrations/codex/codex-skills-system.md, erk/dispatch-ref-config.md)
❌ Verbatim source code — Found in erk-statusline.md, inference-hoisting.md, time-injection-patterns.md
❌ Inaccurate claims — Found in time-injection-patterns.md
❌ Drift risk (line-range refs) — Found in capability-system.md:119, one-shot-workflow.md:160
❌ Drift risk (enumerable catalog) — Found in capability-system.md:125

### Violations Summary
- `docs/learned/architecture/erk-statusline.md:122`: VERBATIM — deduplication code block copies statusline.py:565-574 (existing comment)
- `docs/learned/architecture/inference-hoisting.md:164`: VERBATIM — LlmCaller.call() method signature (existing comment)
- `docs/learned/testing/time-injection-patterns.md:23`: INACCURATE — class named `Time` not `TimeGateway` (existing comment)
- `docs/learned/testing/time-injection-patterns.md:45`: VERBATIM — FakeTime usage pattern (existing comment)
- `docs/learned/architecture/capability-system.md:119`: DRIFT RISK — line-range reference instead of name-based pointer (new)
- `docs/learned/architecture/capability-system.md:125`: DRIFT RISK — enumerable catalog table of required bundled skills (new)
- `docs/learned/planning/one-shot-workflow.md:160`: DRIFT RISK — private method `_postprocess_slug()` named in prose (new)

### Files Reviewed
- `docs/learned/architecture/capability-system.md`: 2 violations (new)
- `docs/learned/architecture/erk-statusline.md`: 1 violation (existing)
- `docs/learned/architecture/inference-hoisting.md`: 1 violation (existing)
- `docs/learned/cli/command-organization.md`: 0 violations
- `docs/learned/cli/implement-command.md`: 0 violations
- `docs/learned/configuration/schema-driven-config.md`: 0 violations
- `docs/learned/erk/dispatch-ref-config.md`: 0 violations
- `docs/learned/integrations/bundled-artifacts.md`: 0 violations
- `docs/learned/integrations/codex/codex-skills-system.md`: 0 violations
- `docs/learned/planning/one-shot-workflow.md`: 1 violation (new)
- `docs/learned/testing/time-injection-patterns.md`: 2 violations (existing)

---

### Activity Log
- **2026-03-03 16:28:38 PT**: Found 7 violations across 4 files; 3 new (2 drift-risk in capability-system.md, 1 private-method in one-shot-workflow.md); 4 pre-existing (2 verbatim + 1 inaccurate from prior run). Skipped 4 duplicate comments.
- **2026-03-03 04:47:29 PT**: Found 4 violations across 3 files: 3 verbatim (erk-statusline.md dedup block, inference-hoisting.md LlmCaller signature, time-injection-patterns.md FakeTime usage), 1 inaccurate (TimeGateway name).
